summary: Champion Continuum universal conversation pivot captured after cold reset. Operator explicitly wants this as its own Continuum faculty/backend, launched by start_deck.bat by the operator, not collapsed into Champion Council. Seven Desktop Senzu Beans were read. Clipboard-relay read succeeded with sha256 87c8a4694d3ea82e088585161808d0ea8400bd33dd22d0599cf7afbcf6b526a7, 64738 bytes, no credential-shaped warnings; private relationship content should be generalized or hashed in durable notes unless explicitly requested. Product blueprint: universal AI-assisted conversation/translation system, Lily-mode feel, simple language/tone toggles, selectable premium/local agent council, Expert-Assisted Parallel-Track Ingestion preserving raw_content plus normalized_core, fixed-point back-translation/arbitration, cherry-pickable agent contributions, and Continuum-native SSE/link protocol for peer Continuums. Verified start_deck.bat currently launches only the local Continuum deck on port 7870 after start_deck_clean.ps1. Current gap: no verified Continuum-owned inbound SSE server yet; existing MCP/SSE code is outbound tool proxy. Gemini-reported EAPTI edits to contracts.py/processor.py were not verified in this export by git diff/status and must not be treated as live until source says so. Next implementation slice: add local Continuum link service, wire start_deck.bat to launch it beside the deck, clean Cultural Bridge away from Champion Council/community guard dependency, and verify existing Nostr/community machinery before copying any pattern.
